faqs.question: Why are crickets common in Boerum Hill brownstones?
faqs.answer: Boerum Hill's historic brownstones often have basements, crawl spaces, and garden-level apartments that provide cool, damp environments where crickets thrive. Older foundations may have small cracks and gaps that allow crickets easy entry, especially during late summer and fall when they seek shelter indoors.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation?

Complete elimination typically occurs within 1-2 weeks, depending on the severity of the infestation and environmental factors. We provide follow-up visits to ensure long-term success.
